resume_sample.raw_text: Senior data scientist with 3 years of experience building production-ready machine learning models, deploying NLP pipelines, and designing data-driven solutions for business automation. Proven expertise in Python, TensorFlow, PyTorch, cloud ML architecture, SQL, data engineering, and team collaboration. Seeking a Machine Learning Engineer role with a remote-first organization that values applied AI, model reliability, and continuous professional growth.
resume_sample.education: Master of Science in Computer Science

job_recommendation_request.education: Master of Science in Computer Science

notes: Use course_recommendation_request and job_recommendation_request to validate the fastAPI endpoints. The sample payload is designed for a professional Machine Learning Engineer profile with strong resume relevance. If the dataset does not include explicit Coursera/Udemy or LinkedIn URL fields, map output titles and company information to the closest marketplace links when validating externally. For UI testing, start run_enhanced_app.py and open http://127.0.0.1:8004/v2/test-ui to upload a resume, view extracted skills, missing skills, job matches, and course recommendations.
